title: Weather (pack level)
description: Genre-level climate rules. Defines climate zones, per-season weather palettes, and rare special events. Consumed by the Phase 1 weather generator (story 24-5) to produce per-scene weather state injected into the narrator prompt zone. PRD §1.1. Authored once per pack; lives at sidequest-content/genre_packs/<pack>/weather.yaml.

climate_zones.description: Map of climate zone id to its rules. A genre pack may have one zone (single-climate setting) or many (continental scope). World content references zones by id.

seasons.description: Map of season id (e.g. 'spring', 'monsoon', 'fire_season') to its weather palette. Season ids are pack-defined — they MUST match calendar.yaml season ids in any world that uses this zone, otherwise prompt-zone injection cannot align weather to time of year.

special_events.description: Rare weather events that may override the season palette. Sampled before the per-scene roll; if one fires, it takes precedence for its duration. Useful for narrative anchors (harvest gales, mutagen storms, fire-season eruptions).

temp_range.description: [min, max] typical temperature for the season, in the units the genre pack uses (Celsius is the default).

precipitation_chance.description: Optional. Probability [0..1] that a scene's weather involves precipitation. If omitted, the generator may infer from condition weights.

conditions.description: Weather condition labels sampled by the generator. Open enum — genres extend with their own flavor (e.g. road_warrior adds 'dust_storm', neon_dystopia adds 'acid_rain'). The narrator receives the chosen label verbatim.

weights.description: Relative weights for the corresponding `conditions` entries. Length MUST equal `conditions` length. Values are integers; the generator normalizes.

name.description: Identifier surfaced to the narrator. Use snake_case.

season.description: Optional. If set, event can only fire during this season id. Omit for year-round events.

chance.description: Per-day (or per-scene, see 24-5) probability the event fires when eligible.

duration_days.description: Optional [min, max] event duration in days. The generator samples uniformly.

effects.description: Optional list of mechanical effect ids the event imposes (e.g. 'travel_penalty', 'visibility_poor'). Effect ids are open enum — downstream stories define how each is consumed.
